title: Screenings on The Green — Outdoor Movie Night
location: The Green at High Street Atlanta, 62 N Main St, Alpharetta, GA
description: Bring a blanket and a date to a complimentary outdoor movie screening on the lawn with free popcorn. Free, no-pressure Thursday-night date that pairs with dinner and drinks on the High Street boardwalk.

title: Summer Slamajama: A Summer Gallery Opening
location: Anne Irwin Fine Art, 690 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Open-air summer art opening with a DJ and refreshments. A relaxed, walk-around kind of date — easy conversation starter and a chance to pick out something for the apartment together.

title: Latin Wednesdays at Tongue & Groove
location: Tongue & Groove, 565 Main St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Weekly Latin night in one of Atlanta's most intimate dance clubs — salsa, bachata, reggaetón with a great crowd. Perfect for couples who want to dance close, take a lesson together, or just people-watch from the lounge.

title: Na'im Lynn at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta, GA
description: A polished headliner in a small-room club setting — exactly the right vibe for a first date or a 'let's get out of the house' weeknight. Cheap enough to grab dinner before or drinks after.

title: Music in the Garden — Atlanta Botanical Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Live outdoor music in the garden as the sun goes down. Walk the trails, listen to the band, and grab a drink at the outdoor bar — peak Atlanta summer date energy, the kind that feels like a movie scene.

title: ATLANTA'S AFRO CARIBBEAN FEST
location: Embr Lounge, 1136 Crescent Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
price: Free entry before 5 PM w/ RSVP (21+)
description: Indoor + outdoor dancefloor with DJs spinning 90s/00s reggae, Afrobeats, and R&B. Late afternoon energy, daylight dancing, full kitchen + drink specials — couples who want to move together without the late-night club scene.

title: Saxophonist Jessy J at Perfect Note Atlanta
location: Perfect Note Atlanta, 1100 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Smooth jazz sax in an intimate midtown listening room. Built for couples — order dinner, share a table, and let the saxophone do the talking.

title: NE-YO & AKON: Nights Like This Tour 2026
location: Lakewood Amphitheatre, 2002 Lakewood Way SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Two R&B heavyweights on one stage outdoors. Pack a blanket, sing every word, and turn it into a late-night drive home singing the same songs.

title: Prima Materia — Group Exhibition Opening
time: 11:00 AM (opening day; runs through the month)
location: Empire Arts Gallery, Atlanta, GA
description: Group exhibition exploring the sacred origin of the creative act. Walk through together, talk about what you each see, and grab coffee after — a low-key afternoon date in the city.

title: Life Space Vegan Chef Cook-Off
location: 294 Hamilton E Holmes Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Live plant-based cook-off with local chefs competing in real time. Watch, taste, and vote — a community-driven Sunday that turns 'what should we do today?' into something memorable.

title: PeachFest 2026
location: Underground Atlanta, 50 Upper Alabama St, Atlanta, GA
description: A celebration of Georgia's most iconic fruit — peach-inspired dishes, cocktails, and live energy in a historic venue. A splurgy Sunday date that doubles as a culinary adventure.

title: Cocktails in the Garden — Atlanta Botanical Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Hand-crafted cocktails in the garden at golden hour. Stroll the trails with a drink in hand, find a bench, let the evening slow down. The closest thing Atlanta has to a movie-romance date.

title: Steel Pulse
location: Center Stage Theater, 1374 W Peachtree St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Grammy-winning roots reggae legends in an intimate midtown venue. A couple's date that turns into a sing-along — reggae on a Saturday night is hard to beat.

title: Savanna Nights at Zoo Atlanta — Boy Bands & Girl Groups
location: Zoo Atlanta, 800 Cherokee Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Adults-only night at the zoo with a Y2K/throwback soundtrack, cocktails, and a totally different energy than a daytime visit. One of Atlanta's most original date nights — slow walking, animal energy, and nostalgia.

title: Phillippia and Yoshi (R&B, Dinner & a Show)
location: Perfect Note Atlanta, 1100 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: R&B showcase with an optional dinner pairing — couples can turn the whole evening into one reservation. Smooth vocals, table service, midtown views.

title: Karlous Miller at Helium Comedy Club (Couple's Package)
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta, GA
description: 85 South / 'Wild 'N Out' favorite headlining a full weekend — with an actual couple's package. Premium seats, food credit, and built-in two-item minimum. Date night with the math already done.

title: Lionel Richie & Earth, Wind & Fire — Sing a Song All Night Long
location: State Farm Arena, 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Two legends, one stage, all the songs. Date-night energy dialed to 11 — both of you will know every chorus. The show that turns into the long, singing-in-the-car drive home.

title: Rooftop Salsa & Bachata Social
location: Reverb Hotel Atlanta, 89 Centennial Olympic Park Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's premier rooftop salsa night — complimentary beginner class at 4:30, then social dancing under the skyline. Full bar, food, and $25 parking (with a drink ticket). The kind of date where neither of you has to know what you're doing.

title: Buju Banton & Stephen Marley: Roots and Rhymes Tour
location: Lakewood Amphitheatre, 2002 Lakewood Way SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Two of reggae's most revered names on one stage outdoors — Buju Banton and Stephen Marley together is a once-in-a-generation pairing. Bring a blanket, soak up the warm July night, and sing into the open sky.

title: Dinner and A Date: A Night Of Soul Live Music
location: Apache XLR, Atlanta, GA
description: Soul-focused live music night built around the dinner-and-a-show format — the entire date fits inside one reservation. Smooth, low-effort, and high-vibe.

title: Rhythm & Roots: A JazzyEats Supper Club Experience
location: JazzyEats LLC, Atlanta, GA
description: Supper-club style evening with live jazz, a curated menu, and a slow, romantic pace. Designed for couples — every part of the night has been thought through so you can just show up.

title: INNER VIEWS Art Exhibition — Opening
location: Atlanta (ARTSATL listed venue)
description: Collective exhibition from fourteen contemporary artists musing on home, family, and community. The opening weekend is the best time to go — full energy, artists often in the room, and the conversations it sparks last longer than the visit.

title: Ink Studded Vegan Fest
location: 1879 S Stone Mountain Lithonia Rd, Lithonia, GA
description: Plant-based food + tattoo artists in one festival — back-to-school vibes, indie crowd, and a totally different Saturday afternoon date. Skip dinner plans and graze.
